attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOCUMENT_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.LANGUAGE1, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.SHORT_TEXT, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.MEDIA_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.APP_SOURCE_VERSION, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.SOURCE_LANG, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.TITLE_V, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL,
 (
 select DOCUMENT_ID,LANGUAGE1,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL
 minus
 select DOCUMENT_ID,LANGUAGE1,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.DOCUMENT_ID = STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.DOCUMENT_ID and ACM.LANGUAGE1 = STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.LANGUAGE1 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL)
